title: cytisanthus numidicus
intro: Cytisanthus numidicus, also known as the Numidian kidney vetch or kidney vetch, is a flowering plant species native to Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and urinary tract infections due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of arthritis, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Cytisanthus numidicus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its dried leaves and flowers can be used to make capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
